personalInfo.name: Hrishabh Tripathi
personalInfo.title: Data Engineer | Azure | Databricks | Snowflake | SQL | Power BI
personalInfo.summary: Experienced Data Engineer and BI & Analytics professional with ~4 years of experience designing scalable ETL/ELT pipelines, data warehouses, and analytics solutions. Skilled in Azure Data Factory, Azure Databricks, Snowflake, PySpark, and advanced SQL for building reliable, high-performance data platforms. Strong background in data modeling, workflow orchestration, cloud technologies, and production support across enterprise environments.

description: Designed and implemented scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using Azure Data Factory and Informatica to ingest data from multiple on-premises and cloud sources into Azure Data Lake and downstream data stores, enabling reliable analytics, reporting, and business intelligence solutions.

Automated and optimized end-to-end data workflows using Azure Data Factory pipelines, improving orchestration efficiency, reducing manual intervention, and ensuring reliable, timely data delivery across enterprise applications and reporting systems.

Monitored and maintained data pipelines across Development, Integration, UAT, and Production environments, ensuring high availability, operational stability, and adherence to enterprise SLA requirements.
Improved data processing performance by 25% through advanced SQL optimization, transformation tuning, and workload optimization across Azure SQL and Snowflake environments.

Designed and developed Snowflake data warehouse solutions, including schema design, table management, complex SQL transformations, and data modeling to deliver curated, analytics-ready datasets for reporting and business intelligence.

Integrated and transformed data from diverse enterprise sources into Snowflake using SQL joins, data modeling techniques, and structured transformations, ensuring high-quality, trusted datasets for downstream consumption.
Utilized Azure Databricks and PySpark to develop scalable data transformation solutions, efficiently processing large-volume datasets and implementing complex business transformation logic.

Led migration of data from on-premises platforms to Azure cloud services including Azure Data Lake Gen2 and Azure Blob Storage, ensuring data integrity, scalability, security, and efficient storage management.

Designed and developed enterprise automation solutions using Python (Tkinter, ttkbootstrap), Selenium, Power Query, VBA, and SQL scripting, reducing manual effort by over 90%, improving productivity, and streamlining operational processes.

Developed and maintained enterprise Power BI dashboards and reporting solutions including Incident Management, Jira Tracking, Resource Utilization, Innovation Programs, WBS Tracking, Account Demand, and Change Management reporting, enabling data-driven business and operational decision-making.

Designed, published, and managed a centralized Power BI App to consolidate reporting solutions, automate dataset refreshes, streamline user access, and improve reporting governance across business stakeholders.

Developed automated Incident and RITM alerting solutions using Power Automate and Microsoft Teams, enabling real-time notifications, faster issue identification, and improved response times for support teams.
Orchestrated and monitored batch-processing workflows using Control-M and Tidal, managing complex job dependencies and ensuring reliable execution of critical business and data-processing workloads.
Implemented monitoring, logging, validation, reconciliation, and batch-tracking frameworks to ensure data quality, reliable pipeline execution, proactive issue detection, and operational stability.

Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Agile Scrum environments using Jira, supporting DevOps practices including version control, sprint planning, deployment coordination, release management, change implementation, and migration of source code repositories from CVS to Bitbucket to strengthen security compliance and support vulnerability remediation initiatives.

Supported production incidents, deployments, and change/release management activities by performing root cause analysis, environment validation, log analysis, and rapid issue resolution to ensure business continuity and system reliability.
Worked on data analysis and research projects for government organization
Gained hands-on experience in data processing and statistical analysis techniques
Contributed to research initiatives and data-driven decision making processes
Designed and implemented webpages for startup clients according to specific requirements and business needs
Conferred with clients to discuss and determine optimal layout design and user experience
Researched new software technologies and design concepts to enhance development capabilities
Designed and implemented a Railway Reservation System to manage ticket bookings, cancellations, passenger records, and seat availability efficiently

projects.title: Azure Data Pipeline (Azure Data Factory + Databricks + Snowflake)
projects.description: Designed and implemented ETL/ELT pipelines using Azure Data Factory to ingest data from APIs, databases, and cloud storage into Azure Data Lake and Snowflake. Utilized Azure Databricks (PySpark) for scalable data transformation and processing.

projects.title: Enterprise Power BI Reporting Platform
projects.description: Developed and maintained Power BI solutions for Incident Management, Jira, Resource Utilization, Innovation Program, WBS, Account Demand, and Change Project tracking. Published and managed reports through a centralized Power BI App with automated refresh scheduling.

projects.title: Incident & RITM Alert Automation (Power Automate + Microsoft Teams)
projects.description: Developed automated workflows for Incident and RITM monitoring, delivering real-time Microsoft Teams notifications and reducing manual monitoring effort.

projects.title: Reporting & Validation Automation Suite (Python + SQL + Excel)
projects.description: Built automation tools using Python, SQL, Power Query, and Excel for reporting, validation, and reconciliation processes, reducing manual effort by over 90%.

projects.title: Operational Support & Mainframe Automation Tools
projects.description: Built Python-based utilities for Mainframe FTP operations including job status monitoring, JCL library syncing, and dataset management. Developed tools for XML processing, batch monitoring, incident and OneForm reporting, and Eclipse automation.
